svg.text: Why DevOps is the perfect fit for Microservices
Without DevOps: 50 services = 50 manual deployments, 50 config files, 50 monitoring dashboards — chaos!
The DevOps CI/CD Pipeline — per microservice
Real-world AWS setup: Microservices + DevOps in action
DevOps + Microservices = The Standard for modern cloud-native apps
Each service has its own: Repo → CI/CD Pipeline → Docker Image → K8s Deployment → Monitoring Dashboard
Team commits code at 10am → tested → scanned → deployed to production by 10:15am. Automatically.
